rulings.Case Title: ROBERT ROSS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Specially Appearing Liability Insurance Carriers Motion To Set Aside The Default And Default Judgment Against Williams And Burrows Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 19, 2017 in Department 503, Line 1. Specially appearing Hartford Fire Insurance Company's and Nationwide Insurance Co.'s motion to set aside default and default judgment against defendant Williams & Burrows, Inc. is continued on the court's own motion to January 4, 2018. = (503/CML)
